title: National Insurance Contributions 2021/2022
text:
INCOME TAX DIVISION
The Treasury Government Office, Douglas
Isle of Man, British Isles
IM1 3TX
Yn Tashtey
Telephone: (01624) 685400
Assessor of Income Tax
Fax: (01624) 685351
Nicola Guffogg
E mail: incometax@itd.treasury.gov.im
Website: www.gov.im/incometax
PRACTICE NOTE
PN 215/21 Date: 17 March 2021
NATIONAL INSURANCE CONTRIBUTIONS - 2021/2022
This Practice Note confirms the National Insurance measures which are kept in line with the UK and
therefore could not be announced until after the UK Budget.
Following the UK Budget, the following change has been approved at the March sitting of Tynwald.
Item (per week unless stated otherwise) 2021/22 2020/21
Class 3 voluntary contributions £15.40 £15.30
The Lower Earnings Limit and the Class 2 rate for volunteer development workers have not been
changed.
PN 214/21 – Budget 2021 – Income Tax and National Insurance proposals has now been updated and
reissued today in order to reflect the above changes.
Nicola Guffogg
Assessor of Income Tax
This Practice Note is intended only as a general guide and must be read in conjunction with the appropriate
legislation. It does not have any binding force and does not affect a person’s right of appeal on points concerning
their own liability to income tax.
Comments and suggestions for improvements of issued Practice Notes and suggestions for future Practice Notes
are always welcome.
1
